title: Update GitHub Actions release workflow dependencies for Node 24 compatibility
notes: 2026-03-21 20:57 - Release run 23387439182 emitted Node.js 20 deprecation warnings for actions/checkout@v4, actions/setup-node@v4, actions/upload-artifact@v4, actions/download-artifact@v4, actions/setup-go@v5, and goreleaser/goreleaser-action@v6. Update the workflow/actions for Node 24 compatibility before June 2, 2026.
closed_reason: Done: all workflows (release.yml, ci.yml) run on Node 24 with modern actions (checkout@v6/setup-node@v6/upload-artifact@v7); v0.18.0 + v0.18.1 released successfully through release.yml.
